title: coelogyne humilis
intro: Coelogyne humilis, also known as the dwarf coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, derived from its roots and rhizomes. The health benefits of Coelogyne humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction by steeping the roots and rhizomes in hot water, or it can be consumed as a powder or capsule after drying and processing.
